description: Fix outdated text in SVG illustration components that no longer matches the codebase — wrong Node.js version, incorrect auth.json description, incomplete defineTool signature, and stale ConfigDirectory layout
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix Node.js version in InstallPaths illustration (20+ → 22+)
userStories.description: As a plugin developer reading the installation page, I want the correct Node.js version requirement so that I install the right version
acceptanceCriteria: In docs/components/illustrations.tsx, the InstallPaths component text 'Node.js 20+' is changed to 'Node.js 22+'
The corresponding .mdx page docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx has its lastUpdated frontmatter set to 2026-02-28
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes: In docs/components/illustrations.tsx, the InstallPaths component (~line 2690) has text '+ Node.js 20+'. The actual requirement is Node.js 22+ (see engines.node in root package.json and platform/*/package.json). Change the text from '+ Node.js 20+' to '+ Node.js 22+'. Also update lastUpdated in docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx frontmatter to 2026-02-28.

userStories.title: Fix ConfigDirectory illustration — auth.json location and description
userStories.description: As a user reading the configuration reference, I want the config directory diagram to accurately show where auth.json lives and what it contains
acceptanceCriteria: In docs/components/illustrations.tsx, the ConfigDirectory component shows auth.json under the extension/ subdirectory (not at the top level of ~/.opentabs/)
The description text for auth.json reads 'Auth secret (written on server start)' — NOT 'Auth secret + port'
The extension/ subdirectory shows dist/ instead of a bare background.js
The corresponding .mdx page docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx has its lastUpdated frontmatter set to 2026-02-28
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
The ConfigDirectory illustration in docs/components/illustrations.tsx (~line 669-829) has several inaccuracies vs the actual ~/.opentabs/ layout:

1. auth.json is shown at the TOP level (~line 723) with description 'Auth secret + port (written on server start)'. Actually auth.json lives INSIDE extension/ at ~/.opentabs/extension/auth.json and contains ONLY the secret (no port). The root CLAUDE.md explicitly states: 'The WebSocket secret is stored in ~/.opentabs/extension/auth.json as { "secret": "<hex>" }'. Move the auth.json entry under the extension/ section and change the description to 'Auth secret (written on server start)'.

2. background.js is shown directly in extension/ (~line 793). Actually the compiled JS is in extension/dist/. Change 'background.js' to 'dist/' with description text like 'Compiled extension JS'.

The SVG uses y-coordinate positioning for layout. When moving auth.json from the top-level section to under extension/, you'll need to adjust y-coordinates. The overall viewBox height may need to increase. Follow the existing neo-brutalist style patterns in the file.

Also update lastUpdated in docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx frontmatter to 2026-02-28.

userStories.title: Fix PluginStructure illustration — add missing description property to defineTool
userStories.description: As a plugin developer reading the plugin development guide, I want the defineTool signature shown in the illustration to include all required properties
acceptanceCriteria: In docs/components/illustrations.tsx, the PluginStructure component's defineTool text shows description as a required property — e.g., 'defineTool({ name, description, ... })' or similar that makes clear description is required
The corresponding .mdx page docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx has its lastUpdated frontmatter set to 2026-02-28
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes: In docs/components/illustrations.tsx, the PluginStructure component (~line 3222) shows the text 'defineTool({ name, input, output, handle })'. The actual ToolDefinition interface in platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts requires { name, description, input, output, handle } — description is a required field. The illustration is missing 'description'. Change the text to include it. Since the text box is 400px wide (~line 3211), there should be enough room. A good option: 'defineTool({ name, description, input, ... })' to keep it concise. Also update lastUpdated in docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx frontmatter to 2026-02-28.
